channel.title: GitHub Trending - Nuovi in PHP (Monthly)
channel.description: Repository (Nuovi) più popolari in PHP nel periodo monthly.

item.title: 🐘 dknauss/wp-sudo (34 ⭐)
item.description:
👤 Owner: dknauss

📝 Repository: dknauss/wp-sudo

📄 Descrizione: Sudo for WordPress! 🥪 Risky actions — activating plugins, deleting users, changing key settings — are gated by a required reauthentication step, regardless of user role. Time-bounded sessions, 2FA support, rate limiting, and configurable policies for REST, WP-CLI, Cron, WPGraphQL, & XML-RPC. No role escalation, no new permissions — just a gate. ⛩️

⭐ Stelle: 34

🍴 Forks: 2

💻 Linguaggio: PHP

🏷️ Topics: access-control principle-of-least-privilege sudo wordpress-admin-backend wordpress-admin-panel wordpress-administrators wordpress-auth wordpress-cron wordpress-multisite-compatible wordpress-plugins wordpress-rest-api wordpress-security wordpress-security-plugin wordpress-users wordpress-xmlrpc wp-cli wpgraphql zero-trust

📜 Licenza: No license

⏰ Creato il: 2026-02-11T01:48:12Z

🔄 Ultimo Aggiornamento: 2026-03-10T01:22:01Z

Visita il Repository su GitHub

]]>
